chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho C.P. No. D-7584 of 2021 [Nadeem Ali Khan v. Rashid Ali Khan & others] Petitioner: Nadeem Ali Khan in person. Date of hearing: 11-11-2024 Date of decision: 11-11-2024 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. - The Petitioner is aggrieved of an order passed by the trial Court and then by the revisional Court dismissing the Petitioner’s application for local inspection of the suit property. From the order dated 17.12.2020 passed by the trial Court, it appears that the application was dismissed for the reason that one inspection had already been carried out, and that the trial Court was of the view that a second inspection would not serve any purpose until the suit is ripe for evidence. When confronted with that, the Petitioner submits that the trial is presently stayed due to an order passed by the Additional Sessions Judge. Be that as it may, the order impugned is reasoned and does not call for any interference. With the observation that the Petitioner would be free to move a fresh application for inspection as soon as the matter is ripe for Petitioner’s evidence, the petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *PA/SADAM
